# Accounting & Advisory   
When Your Growth Demands It.
We understand that you want to grow your business and reduce your risks.   
That’s why we offer solutions that can help you achieve your goals and meet your compliance needs.
## Why Choose Centri?
At Centri, we leverage our experience in accounting, finance, and management   
with our knowledge of capital markets to give your business guidance when it matters most.   
Tailored to you, we provide accounting and advisory services designed for any stage of the business lifecycle.
[See Why We Can Help You Succeed](https://centriconsulting.com/one-firm/)

From the technical details to the big-picture strategy — our team can do it all. We provide first-rate business advisory services and accounting solutions rooted in experience and designed to exceed your expectations.

## **Centri Capital Conference**
On **April 14, 2026** , at Nasdaq in New York City, the **Centri Capital Conference** will feature dynamic programming with exclusive presentations from disruptive companies, thought-provoking panels, and structured one-on-one meetings.
[See the Highlights](https://centriconsulting.com/capital-conference/#highlights)
Client Success Stories
The Centri team is highly accountable, takes ownership of projects, and drives engagement from all stakeholders. The team’s deep knowledge and skill in their area of specialization have contributed significantly to effectively solving complex problems.
Investment Operations, Leading FinTech Company

# The fastest way to finance software and hardware
Choose Capchase as your financing partner to close deals faster and increase your earnings. Approve your buyer, configure your offer, and win your deal in minutes.
[Book a call](https://www.capchase.com/demo)
Trusted by over 10,000 vendors & buyers
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6146543ab50f167ae088b201/68c2bfd6294531eb547b806e_gradient-1.webp)
### Buyers expect payment options
82% of U.S. companies use financing for equipment and software. If you don’t offer it, you risk losing the deal.
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6146543ab50f167ae088b201/68c2c0d038469984e1c349d7_image-2.webp)
### Financing is often the roadblock
Clunky, slow, and unreliable processes stall sales. Done right, financing accelerates deals and keeps you in control.
### Capchase makes financing easier
Close high-velocity or high-complexity transactions in minutes, not weeks. Reseller partner approved.
## Experience the Capchase advantage
Embedded vendor financing that delivers faster approvals, easy deal configurations, and real-time deal status–right where you work.
For Sales
### Close more deals at a higher value
Use flexible payment options as a competitive advantage. Whether your customer prefers monthly, quarterly, or extended net terms - give them the choice they want.
[Learn more](https://www.capchase.com/department/sales)
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6146543ab50f167ae088b201/68cc2f18bce12671fa026ec0_laptop-new.webp)

For Finance
### Get paid upfront without slowing sales
Offer payment flexibility while still getting paid upfront on every deal—including multi-year and reseller deals—eliminating billing headaches and putting an end to chasing payments.
[Learn more](https://www.capchase.com/department/finance)
## Win-win for your business, partners, and customers
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6146543ab50f167ae088b201/68c2da91024544ae491cae81_webp.webp)
### Vendors & Manufacturers
Get paid upfront, empower customers with flexible payments, and leave the collections burden to us. Partner channel approved.
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6146543ab50f167ae088b201/68c2dabce8165ab45ce7b7dd_layout.webp)
### Reseller Partners
Cut closing from weeks to minutes with easy financing, seamless checkout, and faster payouts.
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6146543ab50f167ae088b201/68c2daef4a17b8835cbdcbc1_buyer.webp)
### Buyers
Allow your customers to optimize their cash flow while still purchasing the tech they need to be successful.
## Everything you need to simplify B2B financing
Use Capchase from within your sales team's daily tools. Create a white-labeled captive financing program. Enjoy a faster, more responsive, and better experience.  

[Learn more](https://www.capchase.com/features)
### Easy deal configuration  

Generate payment options to best fit your deal including term length, payment frequency, net terms, and subsidy—calculating pricing in real-time.
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6146543ab50f167ae088b201/679b7b12129d16826d688902_PL-visual.svg)
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6146543ab50f167ae088b201/679b7bc368ed600e8a5ded7f_Vendor-PL.svg)
### Instant buyer qualification
Approve your customers in advance—in just minutes not weeks—so you can offer financing confidently.
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6146543ab50f167ae088b201/68cc1631ae0cd168e0f2e1d5_ui.png)![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6146543ab50f167ae088b201/68cc1631ae0cd168e0f2e1d5_ui.png)
### Captive financing program  

Extending your brand throughout the payments experience, powered and funded by Capchase.
### Embedded in your sales tools
Work directly in Salesforce CRM, receive immediate updates in Slack or Teams, track your buyer’s order completion live.
